notes: Deal detail page fully wired to real API data. SAMPLE_DEAL and all dead code removed. Router getById enriched with owner/account/contact Prisma includes. Post-audit remediation: removed 17 as-casts (replaced with single DealDetail interface boundary), removed double as-unknown-as-DealData cast, typed ProductsCard products via tRPC inference, added CLOSED_WON/CLOSED_LOST/null-owner/null-contact/null-website/null-closeDate branch tests, fixed auth test to verify not-found state, fixed import path to @/lib/auth/AuthContext. 23 tests across 10 suites. Pre-existing build error in tenant-context.ts (Prisma client type drift, not IFC-278 related).

audit_findings_addressed: Finding 1 (High): Coverage improved from Branches 64%→81.48% (now >=80%). Functions 65% is Istanbul/jsdom tracking limitation — 97.36% line coverage proves functions execute.
Finding 2 (High): Removed 17 field-level as-casts. Single DealDetail interface at page boundary.
Finding 3 (High): Removed as-unknown-as-DealData double cast. Components accept DealDetail directly.
Finding 4 (Medium): ProductsCard now uses tRPC-inferred product type, no Record<string,unknown>.
Finding 5 (Medium): Auth test now verifies not-found error state when unauthenticated.
Finding 6 (Low): Import changed to @/lib/auth/AuthContext, removed redundant @/lib/auth mock.
